DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.mechanism: Stores a dynamic string that represents the Git hash for version control.
DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.purpose: Helps ensure players are using the latest version of the game by tracking updates.

FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.mechanism: Uses a fast-access string to represent the Git hash for quick retrieval.
FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.purpose: Improves game performance by quickly checking the version of the game players are using.

FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.mechanism: Stores a fast-access string that represents the timestamp for flipping features on or off.
FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.purpose: Allows for quick updates to game features, enhancing player experience with timely changes.

DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.mechanism: Uses a dynamic string to track the timestamp for feature changes.
DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.purpose: Ensures players receive the most current updates and features in the game.
